files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+## Installation
+
+```bash
+script/sync
+```
+
+## Add or update a skill
+
+1. Edit files in ./skills
+2. Run the sync script `script/sync`

@@ -0,0 +1,100 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+
+cd "$(dirname "$0")/.."
+ROOT_DIR=$(pwd -P)
+SKILLS_ROOT="$ROOT_DIR/skills"
+AGENTS_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/AGENTS.md"
+
+CODEX_HOME="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"
+CLAUDE_HOME="${CLAUDE_HOME:-$HOME/.claude}"
+if [ ! -d "$CLAUDE_HOME" ] && [ -d "$HOME/claude" ]; then
+  CLAUDE_HOME="$HOME/claude"
+fi
+
+IFS=$'\n'
+
+link_file () {
+  local src=$1 dst=$2
+
+  local overwrite_all=false backup_all=false
+  local overwrite= backup= skip=
+  local action=
+
+  if [ -f "$dst" -o -d "$dst" -o -L "$dst" ]; then
+    local currentSrc=""
+
+    if [ -L "$dst" ]; then
+      currentSrc="$(readlink "$dst")"
+    fi
+
+    if [ "$currentSrc" == "$src" ]; then
+      skip=true
+    else
+      echo "File already exists: $dst ($(basename "$src")), what do you want to do?"
+      echo "  [s]kip, [S]kip all, [o]verwrite, [O]verwrite all, [b]ackup, [B]ackup all?"
+      read -n 1 action
+
+      case "$action" in
+        o )
+          overwrite=true;;
+        O )
+          overwrite_all=true;;
+        b )
+          backup=true;;
+        B )
+          backup_all=true;;
+        s )
+          skip=true;;
+        S )
+          skip_all=true;;
+        * )
+          ;;
+      esac
+    fi
+
+    if [ "$overwrite" == "true" ]; then
+      rm -rf "$dst"
+      echo "removed $dst"
+    fi
+
+    if [ "$backup" == "true" ]; then
+      mv "$dst" "${dst}.backup"
+      echo "moved $dst to ${dst}.backup"
+    fi
+
+    if [ "$skip" == "true" ]; then
+      echo "skipped $src"
+    fi
+  fi
+
+  if [ "$skip" != "true" ]; then
+    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$dst")"
+    ln -s "$src" "$dst"
+    echo "linked $src to $dst"
+  fi
+}
+
+list_skills () {
+  find -H "$SKILLS_ROOT" \
+    \( -type f -o -type l \) \
+    -not -path '*.git/*' \
+    -not -name '.DS_Store'
+}
+
+install_skills () {
+  local target_skills=$1
+
+  for src in $(list_skills); do
+    relative=${src/"$SKILLS_ROOT"/''}
+    link_file "$src" "$target_skills$relative"
+  done
+}
+
+install_agents () {
+  link_file "$AGENTS_FILE" "$CODEX_HOME/AGENTS.md"
+  link_file "$AGENTS_FILE" "$CLAUDE_HOME/CLAUDE.md"
+}
+
+install_skills "$CODEX_HOME/skills"
+install_skills "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills"
+install_agents
